skills.name: Agent Skill Sharpener (Reactive)
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Automatically sharpen agent skills by mining PEN/WIN entries from agent files, converting past failures into regression tests, and iteratively improving agent capabilities. More targeted than generic skill creation - focuses on fixing known weaknesses and amplifying proven strengths.

skills.name: Agent Sharpening 2026 (Proactive)
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: Apply 2026 industry best practices to sharpen Nash agents using patterns from OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, CrewAI, and top production frameworks. Systematically audits agents against 5 core principles, identifies gaps using 9 proven workflow patterns, and applies targeted improvements to reduce tokens by 60-80% while increasing quality.
